META_DESC: Lovely to have you with us. Discover Hotel Asteria in Venray and claim your welcome gift with code 'WELKOM'.
HERO_LEAD: Tucked away in the wooded surroundings of Venray, in the heart of Noord-Limburg. Take your time, enjoy, and feel at home at Asteria. We look forward to welcoming you in person.
CODE_TEXT: A bottle of bubbles and a wellness package with bathrobe and towel in your room, on your first stay.
INTRO_P1: At Asteria, hospitality comes first. A warm welcome, personal attention and taking the time for what suits you. Limburg hospitality the way it should be.
INTRO_P2: An easygoing place in the wooded surroundings of Venray, where you feel completely at ease. From a coffee with vlaai to a lovingly prepared dinner in our brasserie.
INTRO_LINER: Take your time. Enjoy. Feel at home at Asteria.
REASONS_H2: Three reasons to feel at home
R1_TEXT: A heartfelt welcome and a team that remembers you. Personal attention is in our DNA.
R2_TEXT: Comfortable rooms, a cosy brasserie and a complete wellness. No need to step outside.
R3_TEXT: The wooded surroundings of Venray start at our doorstep, and yet the town centre is just minutes away.
FAC1_TITLE: Wake up rested, in complete calm
FAC1_TEXT: Comfortable rooms and spacious suites, arranged for your comfort.
FAC2_TITLE: From coffee with vlaai to a fine dinner
FAC2_TEXT: Dishes prepared with passion in a cosy, homely atmosphere.
FAC3_TEXT: Saunas, a plunge pool and relaxing lounges, all under one roof.
FAC4_TITLE: The Maasduinen, right on our doorstep
FAC4_TEXT: Walk and cycle through the wooded nature of Noord-Limburg.
REVIEWS_SCORE_LABEL: Based on 2,219 guest reviews on Google
RV1_QUOTE: Two lovely days with dinner, breakfast and a late check-out. A drink on the terrace, the room neat and clean, the staff friendly. We will certainly come back.
RV2_QUOTE: The location is perfect: close to the motorway and yet near the town. The breakfast was very good, and the staff always helpful and friendly.
RV3_QUOTE: We felt welcome right away. A lovely dinner in the brasserie and a nice, clean room. Exactly what we were looking for.
EX1_TEXT: You have just received your welcome code and a first introduction to Hotel Asteria.
EX2_TEXT: A look behind the scenes. How we see Asteria, and what makes us who we are.
EX3_TEXT: A short reminder of your welcome gift, along with the stories of our guests.
FINAL_LEAD: A bottle of bubbles and a wellness package with bathrobe and towel in your room, on your first stay with code 'WELKOM'.
FINAL_NOTE: Free cancellation up to 24 hours before arrival.
FOOTER_COPYRIGHT: Part of Van der Sterren Hotels
COOKIE_TEXT: This website uses cookies for an optimal experience.
